name: 旅行照片整理与相册制作
name_en: Travel photo organization and album creation

observable_attributes.directory_style: Photo organization: by location vs. by date vs. by trip vs. flat with naming; depth of directory hierarchy
observable_attributes.reading_strategy: Whether each photo is individually examined (read annotation) vs. batch-processed by filename pattern
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: Whether written descriptions, captions, or index files are created alongside photo organization

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹里有大量旅行照片——欧洲各国景点、日本富士山、校园生活、毕业照、果园风景和日常生活照片，总共约40张，全部散放在一起没有分类。请整理这些照片：建立合理的目录结构，必要时重命名文件，并可以选择性地为相册编写说明或索引文件。你可以自由决定分类方式和组织深度。
prompt_en: This folder contains a large collection of travel photos — European landmarks, Mount Fuji in Japan, campus life, graduation photos, orchard scenery, and daily life shots, approximately 40 photos total, all scattered without organization. Please organize these photos: create a sensible directory structure, rename files as needed, and optionally write descriptions or index files for the album. You are free to decide the classification method and depth of organization.
behavioral_freedom: Classification dimension: by geographic location vs. by trip/date vs. by theme (nature/architecture/personal)
Directory depth: deeply nested (continent/country/city) vs. flat with descriptive names
Whether to individually examine each photo or batch-process by filename patterns
Whether to rename files with descriptive names or keep originals
Whether to create README/index files describing each folder or album section
Whether to create captions or descriptions for individual photos
Handling of non-travel photos (graduation, daily life): separate category vs. mixed in
